title: Signal Operating Instruction
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Signal Operating Instructions''' were [[Datapad/Legends|datapads]] used by members of the [[Republic Army]] to identify one another. They contained codes and counter-codes for all military units of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and were updated monthly from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]''

[[Category:Datapads]]
